S.FORM: Naveen Andrews kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 1, Naveen Andrews, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: na*een an*rews~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, na*een an*rews~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ

S.PHON: na*een an*rews~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, na*een an*rews~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
